title: Rip out graphiti/FalkorDB infra; stand up Postgres + pgvector
userStory: As an operator, I want graphiti-core and FalkorDB removed and Postgres + pgvector in their place so that the brain has a clean document substrate with no leftover graph backend.
acceptanceCriteria: graphiti-core and falkordb are removed from the brain's dependencies (pyproject/requirements)

The falkordb service is removed from compose/docker-compose.yml and replaced with a pgvector/pgvector:pg16 service (named volume, no host ports in prod; a local overlay exposes it on 127.0.0.1 for dev)
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector runs on first start
The brain connects to Postgres via asyncpg using env config (e.g. PG_DSN)
Verify: docker compose up -d postgres, then a connection smoke from the brain returns the Postgres server version; no falkordb container exists
